Bureau has an inhouse proprietary algorithm to compute this score basis the dimensions of characteristics like pricing premium, prevelance and popularity rank ordering of these ecomm platforms. Few or no registrations on general e-commerce websites/services like Amazon, Flipkart, Snapdeal, etc. Observed value: 9.0.
